<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\TDigest; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/tdigest.create/ * * Allocates memory and initializes a new t-digest sketch. */ class TDIGESTCREATE extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'TDIGEST.CREATE'; } public function setArguments(array $arguments) { if (!empty($arguments[1])) { $arguments[2] = $arguments[1]; $arguments[1] = 'COMPRESSION'; } elseif (array_key_exists(1, $arguments) && $arguments[1] < 1) { array_pop($arguments); } parent::setArguments($arguments); } }
